items.title: openhuman
items.description: Your Personal AI super intelligence. Private, Simple and extremely powerful.
items.description_zh: 您的个人人工智能超级智能。私密、简单且极其强大。

items.description_zh: 克劳德·代码的学术研究技巧：研究→写作→审阅→修改→定稿

items.description: "CLI-Anything: Making ALL Software Agent-Native" -- CLI-Hub: https://clianything.cc/

items.description: A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing.
items.description_zh: 一套用于研究、科学、工程、分析、金融和写作的现成可用的代理技能。

items.title: supertonic
items.description: Lightning-Fast, On-Device, Multilingual TTS — running natively via ONNX.
items.description_zh: 快如闪电、设备内多语言 TTS — 通过 ONNX 本地运行。

items.title: llama.cpp
items.description_zh: C/C++ 中的 LLM 推理

items.title: RuView
items.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
items.description_zh: π RuView 将商用 WiFi 信号转化为实时空间智能、生命体征监测和存在检测 - 所有这些都无需视频像素。

items.title: CloakBrowser
items.description: Stealth Chromium that passes every bot detection test. Drop-in Playwright replacement with source-level fingerprint patches. 30/30 tests passed.
items.description_zh: Stealth Chromium 通过了所有机器人检测测试。使用源级指纹补丁替换 Playwright。 30/30 测试通过。

items.title: agent-skills
items.description: The secure, validated skill registry for professional AI coding agents. Extend Antigravity, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot and more with absolute confidence.
items.description_zh: 专业人工智能编码代理的安全、经过验证的技能注册表。绝对有信心扩展反重力、克劳德密码、光标、副驾驶等。

items.title: Shadowbroker
items.description: Open-source intelligence for the global theater. Track everything from the corporate/private jets of the wealthy, and spy satellites, to seismic events in one unified interface. Hook an AI agent up to have it parse through data and find previously unseen correlations. The knowledge is available to all but rarely aggregated in the open, until now.
items.description_zh: 全球战区的开源情报。在一个统一的界面中跟踪从富人的公司/私人飞机、间谍卫星到地震事件的一切信息。连接人工智能代理，让它解析数据并找到以前未见过的相关性。这些知识可供所有人使用，但迄今为止很少公开汇总。

items.title: 12-factor-agents
items.description: What are the principles we can use to build LLM-powered software that is actually good enough to put in the hands of production customers?
items.description_zh: 我们可以使用哪些原则来构建由 LLM 驱动的软件，这些软件实际上足够好，可以交付给生产客户？

items.title: Sana
items.description: SANA: Efficient High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Linear Diffusion Transformer
items.description_zh: SANA：使用线性扩散变压器进行高效高分辨率图像合成

items.title: ai-agents-for-beginners
items.description: 12 Lessons to Get Started Building AI Agents
items.description_zh: 开始构建 AI 代理的 12 课

items.title: daily_stock_analysis
items.description: LLM驱��的 A/H/美股智能分析：多数据源行情 + 实时新闻 + LLM决策仪表盘 + 多渠道推送，零成本定时运行，纯白嫖. LLM-powered stock analysis system for A/H/US markets.
items.description_zh: LLM驱动的A/H/美股智能分析：多数据源行情+实时新闻+LLM决策仪表盘+多渠道个体，零成本定时运行，纯白嫖。适用于 A/H/美国市场的 LLM 驱动的股票分析系统。

items.title: analytics
items.description: Open source, privacy-first web analytics. Lightweight, cookie-free Google Analytics alternative. Self-hosted or cloud.
items.description_zh: 开源、隐私第一的网络分析。轻量级、无 cookie 的 Google Analytics 替代品。自托管或云。
